heroSub: Enter your confirmation code to view all booking details
errorEmpty: Please enter your booking confirmation code.
errorNotFound: No booking found with this code. Please check again.
errorGeneral: An error occurred. Please try again later.
errorPayment: Unable to create payment link. Please try again.
thankYou: Thank you for choosing BBHH Resort. We wish you a wonderful stay!
unpaidDesc: Complete payment to confirm your reservation
confirmedDesc: We wish you a wonderful stay at BBHH Resort!

steps.title: Check your email
steps.desc: Your confirmation code was sent to your email when you booked successfully.

steps.title: Enter the code
steps.desc: Paste or type the code in the search box above (e.g. ABC123456).

steps.title: View details
steps.desc: The system will display all your booking information.

emailLookupSub: Enter the email you used when booking to retrieve your confirmation code.
lookupError: No bookings found for this email. Please check again or contact support.
lookupErrorGeneral: Unable to search automatically. Please call 0909.448.608 or submit a support request below.
supportDesc: Check your spam folder or contact us
successEmailDesc: Please click Send in your email app to complete the support request.
issuePlaceholder: e.g. I booked on May 16th but did not receive a confirmation email...
